name: the short signal spa does not match inside the word space so a storage workload is not a web frontend
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a storage space for archived files" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); ! echo "$T" | grep -qE 'web-frontend' && echo spa-not-in-space 1>&2
